title: Complaint email basics
subtitle: Write a short polite complaint.
overview: Use a greeting, problem, request, closing.
Keep the tone direct but calm.

items.es: Estimados señores: escribo porque tengo un problema con mi reserva.
items.en: Dear Sir/Madam: I am writing because I have a problem with my reservation.

items.es: Reservé una habitación para el viernes, pero no recibí confirmación.
items.en: I booked a room for Friday, but I did not receive confirmation.

items.es: Quisiera confirmar la reserva o cambiar la fecha.
items.en: I would like to confirm the reservation or change the date.
